principles: LOOP remains a dumb lifecycle shell and packet owner.
spawn owns signal normalization, transition validation, and actuation dispatch.
GitHub labels carry coarse remote state; spawn reconciles them into local authoritative FSM state.
Every non-trivial local side effect runs via systemd oneshot or transient units.

source_classes.purpose: turn artifact existence/change into a raw local signal for spawn normalization
observe authoritative coarse remote gate state

source_classes.raw_signal_substrate: workflow result projected into issue labels or check results
source_classes.purpose: publish remote gate outcomes and async validation results

source_classes.adapter: hook wrapper -> spawn or ledger writer
source_classes.purpose: emit local commit-side signals without taking planning authority

source_classes.adapter: unit status probe or explicit result artifact

rules: path units detect file/dir changes only; they do not interpret phase semantics
semantic transition meaning is resolved inside spawn
oneshot bridge units are idempotent and may no-op on duplicate observations

actuation_chain: adapter emits normalized signal.event payload candidate
spawn validates candidate against current FSM state
spawn dispatches oneshot/transient actuator when a side effect is required
actuator writes local state artifact and/or remote projection update
actuator completion is observed as a new event source
failure_rules: illegal transition => reject and record transition.failed
remote timeout => timeout.detected without guessing the next state
missing artifact proof => do not advance FSM

idempotency.policy: same idempotency key may be replayed safely; first successful application wins

open_design_points: Pin oneshot/transient unit naming and templating.
Define normalized signal.event schema and persistence location.
Define exact GitHub label replacement semantics.
